name: Pj's Alaskan Zucchini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté pork sausage with chopped onion until the sausage is browned.
2. Pour off any excess grease.
3. Cook bulgur wheat according to package directions until it is tender.
4. Measure out 1 1/2 cups of cooked bulgur.
5. Wash and slice zucchini.
6. Combine sautéed pork, onion, cooked bulgur, sliced zucchini, and canned tomatoes in a casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese on top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes. Serves 6.
